外部 Agent 技能仓库融合评估

如何以更小上下文成本融合到 Personal Agent Node？

Research brief

研究概览

2研究对象
3比较维度
4证据来源

核心问题

  1. 如何以更小上下文成本融合到 Personal Agent Node？
研究对象状态核心结论
Deep-Research-skillscompleteThe repository provides a controlled outline-to-investigation workflow, but its Codex package is five separately registered skills backed by a globally configured researcher agent and PyYAML.
baoyu-skillscompleteThe repository offers 21 broad skills with strong creation workflows and useful scripts, but the upstream itself recommends selective installation because registering everything consumes context and several tools require Bun, browser sessions, credentials, or reverse-engineered APIs.
02

研究项 · 已完成

Deep-Research-skills

The repository provides a controlled outline-to-investigation workflow, but its Codex package is five separately registered skills backed by a globally configured researcher agent and PyYAML.

工作流模型

high

Five phases: create an outline, add items, add fields, run per-item deep research, and generate a report. Human confirmation is used around scope and batches.

证据s1s2

运行依赖

high

  • PyYAML

  • a custom web_researcher Codex agent

  • global ~/.codex/config.toml agent registration

  • multi-agent and live web search support

证据s1s2

融合决策

high

Merge the five phases into one deep-research skill. Replace YAML and global agent registration with a workspace JSON schema, the shared skill-tree CLI, and runtime-native bounded agents.

证据s1s2
证据覆盖完整

当前范围内未记录未解决缺口。

来源

  1. Deep Research Skill 中文说明Weizhena/Deep-Research-skills · 访问 2026-07-10
  2. Reviewed source tree at e5479f8GitHub · 2026-05-08 · 访问 2026-07-10
03

研究项 · 已完成

baoyu-skills

The repository offers 21 broad skills with strong creation workflows and useful scripts, but the upstream itself recommends selective installation because registering everything consumes context and several tools require Bun, browser sessions, credentials, or reverse-engineered APIs.

工作流模型

high

Independent leaf skills cover capture, formatting, translation, raster creation, diagrams, media compression, social publishing, and local utilities. Creative skills separate analysis, confirmation, prompt files, generation, and QA.

证据s1s2

运行依赖

high

  • Node.js and npx bun for most deterministic scripts

  • runtime image generation for visual skills

  • Chrome/browser sessions for several capture and publishing paths

  • service credentials for API publishing

  • wx-cli for local WeChat summaries

证据s1s2

融合决策

high

Split by capability and merge into knowledge-capture, content-workbench, visual-content, and media-toolkit. Route every public artifact and share URL through Open Agent Bridge Online Pages. Exclude reverse-engineered session APIs and direct social-account automation; defer Electron extraction and local WeChat summaries.

证据s1s2
证据覆盖完整

当前范围内未记录未解决缺口。

来源

  1. baoyu-skills 中文说明JimLiu/baoyu-skills · 访问 2026-07-10
  2. Reviewed source tree at 6b7a2e4GitHub · 2026-07-03 · 访问 2026-07-10
04

限制与缺口
